caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bowtie, glasses, and over-ear headphones. He wears a prominent, grey, textured wig that stands tall on his head. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments, including one with the text "LEE". To the left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST", and to the right, red text says "BOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in place, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions as he speaks, moving from a neutral look to a slight frown and then a more open-mouthed expression. The lighting and camera angle remain constant throughout the clip.
